name: shambaluv-auth
description: Self-hosted social-login -> sovereign wallet -> 1-trillion-LUV airdrop backend for SHAMBA LUV. Off-chain Sybil gate for the signature-gated ShambaLuvAirdrop contract. Cypherpunk2048 wallet hosting; no paid third-party service.

comments.providers: Google, Discord, GitHub wired concretely. Apple (passport-apple) and X/Twitter (OAuth2 PKCE strategy) are pluggable — add the dep + env vars, then uncomment in src/auth/strategies.js.
comments.ethers: The dependency is declared for standalone installs, but at runtime src/ethers.js prefers the repo's vendored ../../../vendor/ethers.umd.min.js (clean-room, no CDN) and only falls back to this npm copy.
